'''mabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uid|uid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uid|uid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mabaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæbækæth|mæbækæth]] || [[word:mæbækæj|mæbækæj]] || [[word:mæbækæsh|mæbækæsh]] || [[word:mæbækæ|mæbækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mababakath|mababakath]] || [[word:mababakaj|mababakaj]] || [[word:mababakash|mababakash]] || [[word:mababaka|mababaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabakath|mabakath]] || [[word:mabakaj|mabakaj]] || [[word:mabakash|mabakash]] || [[word:mabaka|mabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabafkath|mabafkath]] || [[word:mabafkaj|mabafkaj]] || [[word:mabafkash|mabafkash]] || [[word:mabafkaf|mabafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mabakatha|mabakatha]] || [[word:mabakaja|mabakaja]] || [[word:mabakasha|mabakasha]] || [[word:mabakaka|mabakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mabakath|mabakath]] || [[word:mabakaj|mabakaj]] || [[word:mabakash|mabakash]] || [[word:mabaka|mabaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mabakathal|mabakathal]] || [[word:mabakajal|mabakajal]] || [[word:mabakashal|mabakashal]] || [[word:mabakakal|mabakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mabakathatha|mabakathatha]] || [[word:mabakajaja|mabakajaja]] || [[word:mabakashasha|mabakashasha]] || [[word:mabakaka|mabakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mabakathan|mabakathan]] || [[word:mabakajan|mabakajan]] || [[word:mabakashan|mabakashan]] || [[word:mabakakan|mabakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mabakathaoro|mabakathaoro]] || [[word:mabakajaoro|mabakajaoro]] || [[word:mabakashaoro|mabakashaoro]] || [[word:mabakakaoro|mabakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
